title: calvaria globosa
intro: Calvaria globosa, also known as the globe calvaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calvaria globosa include its potential in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of Calvaria globosa are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally or internally to take advantage of the plant's medicinal properties.
